name: Workflow Execution Estimator
description: Estimates the execution shape of a workflow run (Mode 1) or an SDLC epic-package breakdown (Mode 2) before it executes: token range, agent turns, tool invocations, complexity, confidence inputs, structural risk flags, and a continue/narrow/stop recommendation. The caller resolves the mode and pre-analyzes the target deterministically before starting this run, supplying the result here as structural facts — both modes converge on the same structural-summary shape, so this workflow's own routing is mode-agnostic. Execution shape only — never a monetary or account-balance concept.

behaviour.reason: No finite execution ceiling could be derived for the analyzed work.
